name: El Pollo Loco's Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the corn oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the whole serrano chilies to the pan and cook until they are tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in the ground serrano chilies.
4. Add the drained pinto beans and water to the pan.
5. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low.
7. Simmer for 17 minutes, stirring often until the beans are tender.
184 calories; 10 grams fat; 49% fat; 2.10 grams fiber. Source: El Pollo Loco Restaurant
